problem id: 6b730629
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  11010010 -> 10100100
  11110010 -> 10101100
  00100010 -> 00011000
  10110010 -> 10111100
  01111011 -> 11000110
  10010011 -> 10111100
  10101011 -> 01110010
  00000101 -> 00101001
  11100001 -> 00110000
  01101011 -> 01000010

query: 01011110
predicted answer: 11100111
